mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_STAR_CONTENT (PRS_ID, CON_BODY, YOUTUBE_URL, CREATED_DATE) VALUES (#{PRS_ID}, #{CON_BODY}, #{YOUTUBE_URL}, NOW())
INSERT INTO STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA (CON_ID, MEDIA_TYPE, MEDIA_URL, THUMB_URL, SORT_ORDER) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, #{MEDIA_TYPE}, #{MEDIA_URL}, #{THUMB_URL}, #{SORT_ORDER})
mapper.select: SELECT M.CON_ID, M.CON_BODY, M.CREATED_DATE, D.THUMB_URL as IMG_URL, D.MEDIA_TYPE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA WHERE CON_ID = M.CON_ID) as MEDIA_COUNT FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT M JOIN STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA D ON M.CON_ID = D.CON_ID WHERE M.PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID} AND D.SORT_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY M.CREATED_DATE DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} AND PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT MEDIA_TYPE, MEDIA_URL, THUMB_URL FROM STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA WHERE CON_ID = #{CON_ID} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_GUEST_BLACKLIST WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
